entries.spec: Adds UI-driven optimization flow in VS Code extension.
entries.codeModule: src/ui/llmUIController.ts, src/ui/llmWebView.ts, src/ui/patchViewer.ts, src/ui/uiBridge.ts; src/extensionActivationHandler.ts; src/syncOrchestrator.ts

entries.capability: Ingestion KiCad->JSON; Drift Python<->JSON via LLM
entries.spec: Ingestion: KiCad -> JSON; Drift: Python <-> JSON via LLM patches.
entries.status: ingestion uses deterministic KiCad hashing; no external kicad_parser wired; mock LLM for JSON regen

entries.capability: Patch previews and patch apply lifecycle
entries.spec: UI: Live streaming LLM outputs, patch previews, and accept/reject for patch application.
End-to-end wiring bridging UI patch acceptance to patchApplyService, state ledger, and persistence, feeding into ingestion/LLM drift to refresh JSON/Python state.
entries.codeModule: src/extensionActivationHandler.ts; src/syncOrchestrator.ts; src/services/patchUtils.ts; src/services/patchApplyService.ts; src/ui/llmUIController.ts; src/ui/llmWebView.ts; src/ui/patchViewer.ts
